paper.title: JADE: Expert-Grounded Dynamic Evaluation for Open-Ended Professional Tasks

official_release.relationship_to_paper: The acquisition-time HEAD commit is dated three days after immutable arXiv v1 submission. The paper links this repository, but does not pin a commit; the archive must therefore be treated as a close post-v1 release rather than proven manuscript-time byte identity.

acquisition_scope: The immutable arXiv v1 PDF was downloaded and converted to layout-preserving full text. The title/abstract, dataset appendix, logic-gating example, human-alignment setup, and final comparison section were inspected to verify coherent extraction through page 23. The official acquisition-time GitHub archive was downloaded and ZIP-tested; its data, configs, rubric hierarchy, dynamic-checklist prompts, scoring, DAG gating, verification-agent, and runner paths were enumerated. This is source acquisition and extraction, not a deep review, evaluator reproduction, or validation of paper claims.
local_storage_note: The PDF and release ZIP are intentionally ignored local evidence; the extracted paper text, paper-index entry, and this provenance record are versioned. Re-fetch ignored artifacts from the immutable URLs above and verify SHA-256 when absent locally.
